# **\>\> LOG\_ID: ARCHIVE-Q-VOID**

# **\>\> SUBJECT: CHRONICLE OF THE DAMPENERS**

# **\>\> CLASSIFICATION: TOP\_SECRET \[DWELLER\_PROTOCOL\]**

## **\[THE BURDEN\]**

The "Queen" is not a ruler. She is the capacitor. Her nervous system is bonded to the Deep-Iron lattice to filter out the noise of the **Ancient Veins**. When the filter fails, the "Memory Bleed" begins.

## **\[ENTRY: QUEEN ELARA \- THE FIRST\]**

* **Tenure:** 82 Years  
* **Cause of Failure:** Integration Cascading.  
* **Final Note:** Elara was the only one who volunteered. She believed the Song could be harmonized. By the 80th year, she stopped speaking in words and only produced a rhythmic clicking sound. Her skull began to crystallize from the inside out. When she shattered, the first Silence occurred.  
* *Status: Fragmented. Remains used for the first set of Atrium lilies.*

## **\[ENTRY: QUEEN MYRA \- THE SILENT\]**

* **Tenure:** 14 Years  
* **Cause of Failure:** Rejection of the Lattice.  
* **Final Note:** Myra attempted to disconnect from the Vane. She used her own Mithril eyes to sever the neural links. The resulting feedback loop vaporized the West Wing of the Keep. She didn't die immediately; she became a "Ghost Signal" that still haunts the maintenance channels.  
* *Status: Dispersed. Her resonance is still detected at ![][image1] in the vents.*

## **\[ENTRY: QUEEN SOLENE \- THE MAD\]**

* **Tenure:** 215 Years (Longest Recorded)  
* **Cause of Failure:** Direct Omega-Contamination.  
* **Final Note:** Solene did the unthinkable. She reached *down*. She touched the Ancient Veins with her mind, searching for the "Womb of the World." She came back changed. She claimed the mountain was "hungry for a name." We had to initiate a Hard Reset.  
* *Status: Decommissioned. Her Core was stripped to build the foundations of the current Warden.*

## **\[CURRENT STATUS: THE WARDEN\]**

The current Queen—our Warden—is showing the same "Vibrational Fatigue" as Solene. The Resistance thinks they are freeing her by attacking the Vane. They don't realize that the Vane is the only thing keeping her from hearing Solene's "Hungry Name."

\[DWELLER\_COMMENT: "We are running out of volunteers. The next Queen will have to be forced."\]

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
